name: babysit
tagline: Polls a GitHub PR (gh/jq/GraphQL) until checks pass and review threads resolve, then reports status with evidence.
verdict: Clean, narrowly-scoped PR watcher. Uses only gh CLI, jq, and GitHub GraphQL against the current repo's own PR; requires verifying bot findings and generated artifacts before acting; resolves threads only after verification; final report demands concrete evidence (commit SHA, checks, thread count). No credential reads, no remote code execution, no destructive

highlights.summary: No explicit negative-trigger guidance (e.g. skip when PR is draft-only or no CI configured); minor omission, low risk to users.
No guidance for gh/API failure modes (auth failure, rate limiting, network errors) or when to give up watching; only handles the 'outdated thread' edge case (line 85).
